content.situation: 你向同事解释为什么会议纪要延迟发送，原因是系统更新导致文件暂时无法访问。
content.speakerText: I'm sorry for the delay in sending the meeting minutes—
content.speakerTextCn: 很抱歉会议纪要发晚了，因为
content.responseTemplate: I'm sorry for the delay in sending the meeting minutes—___

blanks.answer: the system update temporarily blocked access to the files
options: the system update temporarily blocked access to the files
I was too busy to finish it

content.hint: 用客观、非指责性的理由说明技术或流程原因，避免归咎于个人或他人
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌解释延迟的客观原因

content.situation: 你向客户说明项目提案延迟提交的原因是内部审批流程比预期更长。
content.speakerText: Thank you for your patience—the reason for the delay is that
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢您的耐心，延迟的原因是内部审批流程比预期更长。
content.responseTemplate: Thank you for your patience—the reason for the delay is that ___

blanks.answer: the internal approval process took longer than expected
options: the internal approval process took longer than expected
I forgot to send it on time

content.hint: 使用正式表达，强调流程性、系统性原因，避免主观或推卸责任的措辞
content.knowledgePoint: 正式场合中解释延迟的流程性原因

content.situation: 你向团队成员说明报告未能按时提交，是因为需要等待另一个部门提供关键数据。
content.speakerText: Apologies for the delay—I was waiting for
content.responseTemplate: Apologies for the delay—I was waiting for ___

blanks.answer: the key data from the other team
options: the key data from the other team

content.hint: 说明延迟是因依赖外部协作，体现合作意识而非拖延
content.knowledgePoint: 解释延迟时强调外部依赖关系
